# SDD phases prompt

Use `docs/pegasus/` as the source of truth: proposal → spec → design → tasks → apply → verify.

Work only on the requested phase. If applying, implement only the next approved task slice. Record verification in `docs/pegasus/verify.md` and update `docs/pegasus/memory/` when facts, decisions, task state, handoff notes, or learnings change.
